name: Repetitive strain from typing all day in South Salt Lake, covered?
description: Yes, if job caused—doctor report key.[1]

mainEntity.name: Repetitive strain from typing all day in South Salt Lake, covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if job caused—doctor report key.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, occupational illnesses like carpal tunnel qualify if work-related.** Utah covers gradual injuries.[1] Key factors: Doctor links to job; report details. Evidence builds over time. Insurer investigates causation.
